notes:
## 1.7.1

## What's new

- **No more “Timed out waiting for parent”** — kid asks stay open on the family link for hours. Phones stay synced; tap Refresh anytime.
- **Richer parent replies** — for each ask: **15 / 30 / 60 / 2h**, **Always allow this app** (or Fun for the day / always allow site), Approve, or Deny.
- **Parent remote** — Settings shows the **kid’s apps**, not apps on the parent phone. Always / Never / timed opens sync over GitHub.
- **What’s in this update** ships again by default with every release.

## Update tip

Install on **both** phones, then on the kid phone open Steady and tap **Refresh** once so the parent remote catalog catches up.
